use_cases: Displaying frequently asked questions in an organized, space-saving manner
Creating collapsible content sections for documentation and help centers
Building expandable navigation menus or sidebars with nested items
Implementing settings panels where detailed options can be toggled visible
Structuring long-form content into digestible, user-controlled sections
ai_summary: A lightweight accordion component built on Radix UI primitives with smooth expand/collapse animations and rotating chevron indicators. Features clean Tailwind CSS styling with hover underline effects and customizable styling via className props. Uses semantic HTML with proper header and button elements for accessibility.
